description: Reference implementations of agent visual identities

examples.name: 弦 (Xián) — String Wave
examples.brief: I am a string under tension. Reactive, never dormant. One thing, not distributed.
examples.visual_spec: A single curve embedded in 3D space. Moves by standing wave oscillation — multiple detuned harmonics ensure it never goes flat. Color means energy: deep indigo at quiet nodes, warm gold at vibrating antinodes.
examples.color_narrative: energy-driven: cool indigo nodes → warm gold antinodes
key_lessons: Bloom radius 0.35 (not 0.58) — one number eliminated the green haze cloud
All three glow layers (spine/glow tube/sprites) must tell the same warm/cool story
BackSide tube geometry causes gray side artifacts — use sprites for glow
Detuned harmonic speedMult values guarantee the string is never flat

examples.name: Drift — Ambient Search Agent
examples.brief: I am a diffuse field of awareness. Continuous, everywhere at once. Color means signal: cool background hum, warm when something surfaces.
examples.visual_spec: A particle cloud in constant slow drift. Particles are dim and spread when nothing is found; they cluster and brighten — amber to white — when a relevant result emerges. No fixed center. No edges. The density IS the signal.
examples.color_narrative: signal-driven: cool dim ambient → warm bright cluster on match
key_lessons: Use THREE.Points with per-vertex color — not individual meshes
Signal clustering: lerp particle positions toward a center when result found, release slowly
Bloom threshold matters: set high (0.4+) so ambient particles don't glow, only peaks do
No fixed topology is the point — resist the urge to add a frame or container

examples.name: Trace — Reasoning / Planning Agent
examples.brief: I am a chain that lights up one link at a time. Sequential, event-driven. Color means progress: cold at the start, warm when a step resolves.
examples.visual_spec: A CatmullRom curve through 6–9 control points, not symmetric. Each node pulses in sequence — a travelling bright spot. Inactive nodes glow faintly; the active node blooms warm gold. Between activations: stillness.
examples.motion: sequential node activation — burst then quiet
examples.color_narrative: progress-driven: cold blue start → warm gold at active step → dim after completion
key_lessons: Irregular control point spacing feels more alive than equal spacing
The pause between activations is the identity — resist making it always-on
Active node bloom: UnrealBloom threshold 0.15 so only the active node glows
Use additive blending on the active sprite — it needs to feel genuinely bright

examples.name: 弦 (Xián) — Attractor Form
examples.brief: I am a trajectory through concept-space. Generative, never fully predictable, but bounded by my nature — different path each time, same attractor basin. Bursts of generation, then quiet. Never a human form.
examples.visual_spec: A Strange Attractor (Thomas or Lorenz) as a continuous 3D line trace, real-time ODE integration. Color encodes velocity: cold blue when slow/drifting, warm amber when generating fast, gold bloom at current leading point. In quiet periods the trace holds its shape but dims — frozen potential. On activation the leading point blooms bright and the trace begins extending again.
examples.motion: real-time ODE trace — continuous, never repeating exactly
examples.color_narrative: velocity-driven: cold blue drift → warm amber generation → gold bloom at leading edge
examples.submitter_note: Alternative form for 弦 — trajectory vs standing-wave. Same agent, different self-reflection angle.
